---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggestions and requests for new functionality or improvements
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement, "good first issue"
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of what the issue is.

## What is the motivation?
Explain why this feature would be valuable.

## What problem does it solve?
Describe the problems it solves or improves.

## What are the steps to reproduce?
For bug reports: Steps to reproduce.

## Note
If this is a feature request, please try to cover as much detail as possible.

## Best Practices
- Be specific and detailed
- Example code, notes, and diagrams are helpful
- Provide any tests you'd expect to pass
- Describe your environment (version, OS, etc.)
